operational_knowledge_units.title: Tag Read and Tag Write logs capture tags read and written by the system
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that Tag Read and Tag Write logs all tags the system reads and writes.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Sorter Sweeper Database / Tipper/Tag Logging'
Visible text: 'Tag Read and Tag Write logs all tags the systems reads and writes.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Tipper/Tag Logging. Tag Read and Tag Write logs all tags the system reads and writes.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Tipper Departure Activity Model records AGV departures from the tipper
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Tipper Departure Activity Model records each time an AGV is sent away from the tipper and includes destination and related trip data.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'Tipper Departure Activity Model records every time an AGV is sent away from the tipper.'
Visible text: 'DropOffSorter or DropOffHospital, the Tote, the Tag path and any fault code are recorded.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Tipper Departure Activity Model records every time an AGV is sent away from the tipper. Recorded fields include DropOffSorter or DropOffHospital, the Tote, the Tag path, and any fault code.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Tipper and tag logging data can help narrow tipper issues
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide explicitly says the recorded tag and tipper departure information can be helpful in narrowing down tipper issues.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'This can be helpful in narrowing down tipper issues.'
Context on slide ties this statement to tag read/write logs and the Tipper Departure Activity Model.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Tag Read and Tag Write logs, together with the Tipper Departure Activity Model, can be helpful in narrowing down tipper issues.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Use Sorter Sweeper Database tag and tipper departure records to investigate tipper issues
preconditions: Access to Sorter Sweeper Database records is available
A tipper issue is being investigated
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide describes Tag Read/Tag Write logging and Tipper Departure Activity Model fields used for troubleshooting tipper issues.

steps.instruction: Review Tag Read and Tag Write logs for tags the system read and wrote during the issue timeframe.
steps.expected_outcome: Relevant tag read/write activity is identified for the investigation window.
steps.validation_check: Tag records are present and correspond to the timeframe being investigated.
steps.visual_region_hint: Text block describing Tag Read and Tag Write logs

steps.instruction: Review the Tipper Departure Activity Model for times when an AGV was sent away from the tipper.
steps.expected_outcome: Departure events associated with the tipper are identified.
steps.validation_check: Records show AGV departures from the tipper.
steps.visual_region_hint: Text block describing Tipper Departure Activity Model

steps.instruction: Check the recorded destination, tote, tag path, and any fault code in those departure records to help narrow the tipper issue.
steps.expected_outcome: Potential issue indicators are narrowed using departure record details.
steps.validation_check: Departure records include destination as DropOffSorter or DropOffHospital and may include tote, tag path, and fault code details.
steps.visual_region_hint: Text block listing DropOffSorter, DropOffHospital, Tote, Tag path, and fault code

warnings: The slide does not provide an exact database query method, UI path, or tool-specific access steps.
The slide states the records are helpful for narrowing issues, not that they conclusively identify root cause.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Diagnostic check candidate: review Tag Read and Tag Write logs and the Tipper Departure Activity Model to narrow tipper issues. Departure records include destination, tote, tag path, and fault code.
